2603.20948.title: gUFO: A Gentle Foundational Ontology for Semantic Web Knowledge Graphs
2603.20948.paper_summary: gUFO is a lightweight implementation of the Unified Foundational Ontology (UFO) suitable for Semantic Web OWL 2 DL applications. UFO is a mature foundational ontology with a rich axiomatization and that has been employed in a significant number of projects in research and industry. Moreover, it is currently in the process of standardization by the International Organization for Standardization as the ISO/IEC CD 21838-5. gUFO stands out from other foundational ontology implementations (such as those provided for BFO and DOLCE) given its unique support for a typology of types (operationalizing OntoClean guidelines), its reification patterns for intrinsic and relational aspects, and its support for situations and high-order types. gUFO provides well-founded patterns to address recurrent problems in Semantic Web knowledge graphs. In this paper, we present gUFO with its constituting categories, relations and constraints, discuss how it differs from the original UFO reference ontology, elaborate on its community adoption, and systematically position it in relation to existing OWL-based implementations of popular alternative foundational ontologies.
2603.20948.paper_summary_zh: gUFO 是一個輕量級的統一基礎本體（UFO）實現，適合用於語意網 OWL 2 DL 應用。UFO 是一個成熟的基礎本體，擁有豐富的公理化，並在研究和工業中被廣泛應用。此外，它目前正由國際標準化組織進行標準化，作為 ISO/IEC CD 21838-5。gUFO 與其他基礎本體實現（如 BFO 和 DOLCE 提供的實現）相比，因其對類型的類型學的獨特支持（實現 OntoClean 指導方針）、其對內在和關聯方面的重構模式，以及其對情境和高階類型的支持而脫穎而出。gUFO 提供了良好的模式來解決語意網知識圖譜中的重複問題。在本文中，我們介紹 gUFO 及其組成類別、關係和約束，討論它與原始 UFO 參考本體的不同，詳細說明其社群採用情況，並系統性地將其定位於現有的基於 OWL 的流行替代基礎本體實現之中。
2603.20948.author: João Paulo A. Almeida et.al.
2603.20948.authors: João Paulo A. Almeida, Giancarlo Guizzardi, Tiago Prince Sales, Claudenir M. Fonseca
